requirement_topic.en: Azerenerji / Azerishig Grid-Connection Requirements for BESS and PCS

summary.en: BESS projects connecting in Azerbaijan must satisfy the applicable network owner and electricity-sector rules. Azerenerji is the main transmission and generation utility, while Azerishig is commonly associated with distribution. Review may cover the PCS, protection, metering, dispatch communication, power quality, operating modes, commissioning, and whether the storage asset is paired with generation or load.
summary.zh: 接入阿塞拜疆电力系统的BESS项目须满足适用电网业主和电力行业规则。Azerenerji主要对应输电和发电，Azerishig通常对应配电。审查可能覆盖PCS、保护、计量、调度通信、电能质量、运行模式、调试，以及储能是否与发电或负荷配套。
summary.zht: 接入亞塞拜疆電力系統的BESS項目須滿足適用電網業主和電力行業規則。Azerenerji主要對應輸電和發電，Azerishig通常對應配電。審查可能覆蓋PCS、保護、計量、調度通信、電能品質、運行模式、調試，以及儲能是否與發電或負荷配套。

standards_or_laws: Azerenerji transmission or system connection requirements where applicable
Azerishig distribution connection requirements where applicable
Project-specific commissioning and network-owner acceptance requirements

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 34120-2023 for electrochemical storage PCS technical requirements, GB/T 36558-2023 for system-level grid-connected ESS requirements, and State Grid or China Southern Power Grid enterprise rules. These Chinese grid documents do not substitute for Azerbaijan network-owner review.
summary.zh: 中国通常采用GB/T 34120-2023作为电化学储能PCS技术要求，GB/T 36558-2023作为并网储能系统级要求，并适用国家电网或南方电网企业规则。这些中国并网文件不能替代阿塞拜疆电网业主审查。
summary.zht: 中國通常採用GB/T 34120-2023作為電化學儲能PCS技術要求，GB/T 36558-2023作為併網儲能系統級要求，並適用國家電網或南方電網企業規則。這些中國併網文件不能替代亞塞拜疆電網業主審查。

standards_or_laws: State Grid / China Southern Power Grid project rules

gap.en: Chinese PCS type-test reports must be translated into Azerbaijan grid settings and local protection philosophy. Exporters should prepare relay settings, frequency and voltage ride-through data, anti-islanding data, reactive-power and power-factor capability, dispatch communication protocol evidence, metering design, single-line diagrams, model files where requested, and commissioning procedures for the Azerbaijan project owner and network review.
gap.zh: 中国PCS型式试验报告须转换为阿塞拜疆电网参数和当地保护原则。出口商应准备继电保护定值、频率和电压穿越数据、防孤岛数据、无功和功率因数能力、调度通信协议证据、计量设计、单线图、需要时的模型文件和调试程序，供阿塞拜疆项目业主及电网审查。
gap.zht: 中國PCS型式試驗報告須轉換為亞塞拜疆電網參數和當地保護原則。出口商應準備繼電保護定值、頻率和電壓穿越數據、防孤島數據、無功和功率因數能力、調度通信協議證據、計量設計、單線圖、需要時的模型文件和調試程序，供亞塞拜疆項目業主及電網審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid connection and energisation where Azerbaijan network-owner or electricity-sector approval applies
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese grid connection where State Grid / Southern Grid project requirements apply

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 34120 or GB/T 36558 evidence does not itself clear Azerbaijan grid connection. Local network-owner review should be addressed before energisation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 34120或GB/T 36558证据本身不能完成阿塞拜疆并网。送电前须处理当地电网业主审查要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 34120或GB/T 36558證據本身不能完成亞塞拜疆併網。送電前須處理當地電網業主審查要求。
